summary: Results-driven Healthcare Business Analyst with 10+ years of experience in business analysis, process improvement, and automation within payer and provider healthcare environments.   Strong expertise in gathering, analyzing, and documenting business and functional requirements including BRDs, FRDs, PDDs, and SDDs.   In-depth knowledge of healthcare workflows such as claims processing, member enrollment, billing, and provider data management.   Hands-on experience with HIPAA compliance, PHI data handling, and regulatory standards including SOX and PCI.   Proven ability to perform AS-IS and TO-BE analysis, gap analysis, and process re-engineering to improve operational efficiency.   Skilled in creating user stories, use cases, workflows, and process flow diagrams using tools like Visio and JIRA.   Extensive experience working in Agile/Scrum environments, participating in sprint planning, backlog grooming, and daily stand-ups.   Strong experience in data analysis, data mapping, and validation using SQL, Excel, and reporting tools.   Expertise in supporting UAT, test planning, defect tracking, and stakeholder sign-offs.   Experience in integrating systems using REST/SOAP APIs, JSON, and XML for seamless data exchange.   Proven track record of collaborating with cross-functional teams, SMEs, and stakeholders to deliver scalable solutions.   Experience working with EHR/EMR systems and document processing platforms (OCR technologies).   Adept at identifying automation opportunities and driving digital transformation initiatives in healthcare operations.   Strong communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills with the ability to bridge business and technical teams.   Experienced in risk identification, issue resolution, and continuous process improvement.   Self-motivated professional with excellent analytical, problem-solving, and decision-making abilities.   Committed to delivering high-quality solutions aligned with business goals and regulatory requirements.
skills:
Healthcare Domain: Claims Processing, Member Enrollment, Billing, EHR/EMR, HIPAA Compliance
BA Skills: BRD, FRD, PDD, SDD, User Stories, Gap Analysis, UAT, Data Mapping
Tools: MS Visio, Excel, SharePoint, JIRA (Agile), Confluence
Databases: SQL Server, Oracle, MySQL
Technologies: REST/SOAP APIs, JSON/XML
Methodologies: Agile, Waterfall
project1_bullet1: Gather and analyze business requirements for healthcare-related automation and digital transformation initiatives.
project1_bullet2: Conduct stakeholder meetings and workshops to understand claims processing, billing, and operational workflows.
project1_bullet3: Create BRDs, FRDs, and Solution Design Documents (SDDs) for healthcare systems.
project1_bullet4: Perform AS-IS and TO-BE analysis to identify process improvement opportunities
project2_bullet1: Worked on payer-side healthcare processes including claims adjudication and member services.
project2_bullet2: Collaborated with SMEs to document PDDs, BRDs, and process workflows.
project2_bullet3: Identified automation opportunities to improve efficiency and reduce manual errors.
project2_bullet4: Conducted gap analysis and feasibility studies for healthcare process improvements.
